_meta.description: Central manifest of all third-party code vendored into this repository, OS packages the panel depends on at runtime, and Eigenbau components with notable upstream inspiration. Update this file whenever a component is added, upgraded, or removed. License files for inline-vendored code must remain in their respective directories; this manifest points to them but does not replace them.

source_type_values.inline: Third-party source copied into the repo. HestiaRE carries the full license-compliance obligation — license file must live alongside the code.
source_type_values.os-package: Installed via apt. The distro ships the code; HestiaRE only declares the dependency. Verify GPL compatibility, but no obligation to ship a separate license file.
source_type_values.eigenbau: Written from scratch for HestiaRE. No upstream code copied. May reference an inspiration_source for audit clarity.

vendored.name: phpquoteshellarg
vendored.reason: Security-hardened shell argument quoting. PHP's native escapeshellarg() corrupts UTF-8 input (e.g. æøå) in processes running a non-UTF-8 locale. This implementation avoids the locale-dependent code path on Unix by wrapping in single quotes unconditionally.

vendored.name: alpinejs
vendored.reason: Panel UI interactivity framework (x-data bindings, stores, notifications, bulk edit). Prebuilt CDN artifact — the GitHub repo commits no dist files and attaches no release assets; the npm registry tarball is the project's official publish artifact (#248).

vendored.name: alpinejs-collapse
vendored.reason: Alpine collapse plugin (x-collapse transitions). Same monorepo and release cadence as alpinejs — updated together (#248).

os_packages.name: libphp-phpmailer
os_packages.license_note: LGPL-2.1-only is compatible with GPL-3.0 per FSF guidance. Distributed by the OS — no obligation for HestiaRE to ship a separate license file.
os_packages.reason: Panel email delivery (password reset, 2FA notifications, admin alerts). Installed via apt — not vendored into the repo.

eigenbau.name: cloudflare-ip
eigenbau.license_obligation: none — independent reimplementation, no code copied. The Unlicense (public domain) would impose no obligations even if code had been copied.
eigenbau.independence_note: CIDR data sourced directly from cloudflare.com/ips-v4 and /ips-v6 (fetched 2026-06-21); ranges diverge from divinity76 (different fetch dates). Implementation uses filter_var() + runtime bitmask strings; divinity76 uses inet_pton() + precomputed integer ranges — different approach, zero shared code lines.
eigenbau.update_procedure: Replace CLOUDFLARE_IPV4_CIDRS and CLOUDFLARE_IPV6_CIDRS arrays from: curl https://www.cloudflare.com/ips-v4/ and curl https://www.cloudflare.com/ips-v6/

eigenbau.name: totp
eigenbau.note: Pure algorithm implementation. No upstream package. Uses only PHP built-ins: random_bytes, hash_hmac, hash_equals, pack.

eigenbau.name: qrcode
eigenbau.note: Pure algorithm implementation. No upstream package. Byte mode, ECC Level M, versions 1-10. No PHP extensions required.

eigenbau.name: randomString
eigenbau.license_obligation: none — independent reimplementation, no code copied.
eigenbau.note: Unbiased random string from a custom alphabet: crypto.getRandomValues + rejection sampling. Replaces the bundled nanoid dependency; only consumer is helpers.js randomPassword() (#248).

eigenbau.name: passwordStrength
eigenbau.license_obligation: none — independent reimplementation, no code copied.
eigenbau.note: Password strength level 0-3 from length + character-class diversity, mirroring the rule model of check-password-strength's default options so the <meter> semantics stay identical. Only consumer is passwordInput.js (#248).
